name: Orange & Brandy Roasted Sweet Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Toss the vegetables with butter and salt and pepper.
3. Roast for 30 minutes, shaking the pan after 15 minutes or so to prevent them from sticking.
4. Mix brown sugar, orange juice, and brandy.
5. Distribute evenly over potatoes and stir gently.
6. Continue to roast for an additional 5 minutes.
7. Turn on the broiler and place the pan on the uppermost rack. Allow potatoes to brown slightly.
8. Remove and serve.
